Shell.footerCopy: Strength, recovery, movement, nutrition, and social wellness under one roof.

MembershipPage.faqTitle: Everything you need to know before you start.
MembershipPage.faqIntro: Whether you're starting from zero or already training, here are the most common questions answered.
MembershipPage.visitTitle: Book a walkthrough, meet the team, and train for a day before joining.

faqItems.question: What does it mean that we are a multidisciplinary center?
answer: It means we do not work in isolation.

If you come because of an injury, your treatment is not limited to one area: physiotherapy, training, nutrition and psychology work in coordination to accelerate your recovery and improve outcomes. The whole team is aligned with one goal: your health.

faqItems.question: I'm not fit yet, can I join?
answer: Yes. In fact, this is the best moment to start.
You do not need to be fit to come here: you come here to become fit. We adapt every session to your current level, no matter your starting point.

faqItems.question: How do I know which service I should start with?
answer: You do not need to decide that on your own.
In your first visit we do an initial assessment and, based on your situation and goals, we recommend the most efficient path.

faqItems.question: Are training sessions group-based or individual?
answer: We offer both formats.
bullets: Small groups (max. 6 people): personalized attention + group motivation.
One-to-one sessions: maximum personalization and demand.

faqItems.question: I have limited time or a complicated routine, is this for me?
answer: Yes.
We offer a wide schedule range and adapt services to your lifestyle. The goal is for the process to fit you, not the other way around.

faqItems.question: I have an injury or chronic pain, can I train?
answer: Yes, and this is exactly where it makes the most sense.
Because physiotherapists are part of the team, we design training programs adapted to pathologies and recovery processes, ensuring safety and progression.

faqItems.question: Is it mandatory to follow a diet if I only want to train?
answer: No, it is not mandatory.
You can hire training only, but we will always guide you on nutrition because it is a key part of progress.

faqItems.question: Why is there a psychologist in the center?
answer: Because change is not only physical.
We work on motivation, your relationship with food, stress, and process adherence. It is a fundamental piece for long-lasting results.

faqItems.question: Do you do miracle diets or mandatory supplements?
answer: No.
We work with real, sustainable, evidence-based nutrition. Supplementation is never mandatory: it is only recommended if it adds value in your specific case.

faqItems.question: What happens if I cannot attend a session?
answer: You can cancel or reschedule by giving the minimum required notice, with no additional cost.

faqItems.question: What should I bring on the first day?
answer: Comfortable sportswear, water, and a towel.
We take care of everything else.

faqItems.question: How long are session bundles valid?
answer: Bundles are valid monthly.
We prioritize continuity and results, not session accumulation.

faqItems.question: Can I cancel whenever I want?
answer: Yes, there is no long-term commitment.
We only ask for notice before the 15th of the previous month to process cancellation correctly.

faqItems.question: Who can benefit from this service?
answer: Anyone who wants to improve their health.

faqItems.question: How do I solve doubts during the process?
answer: You will have direct contact with the team through WhatsApp or email.
Questions are resolved quickly and continuously.

faqItems.question: If I hire the service, will I get results?
answer: We provide the system, the follow-up and the experience.
Results depend on your involvement in the process. With commitment, results come.

faqItems.question: Do nutrition plans include supplementation?
answer: Plans are 100% personalized.
Supplementation is optional and only recommended if useful for your goal. The final decision is always yours.

faqItems.question: What is the price of the services?
answer: We work with a flexible model based on memberships and individual services, adapted to your needs and goals.
Price does not depend only on personalization level, but also on service type and the support you need at each stage.
After an initial assessment, we recommend the most suitable option for you. Our goal is for you to pay only for what you truly need, no more and no less.
bullets: More complete plans integrating multiple areas (training, physiotherapy, nutrition, etc.).
